title: Team Pets
description: Prevents tamed animals from attacking teammates & their pets.
body:
This mod makes it so your pets will be completely passive around your teammate & their pet, all by doing 1 command.

**COMMAND FORMAT:**
/teampets add <name of the player you want to whitelist> (adds a player to the whitelist)

/teampets remove <name of the player you want to remove from the whitelist> (removes a player from the whitelist)

/teampets list (lists every player you've whitelisted)

This mod does not make it so you can share pets, there are other mods for this. This mod simply makes it so your pet will not attack the whitelisted player or their own pet.
